info.name: Pawffy 2.0 API
info.description: Complete Postman collection for Pawffy 2.0 – AI Powered Pet Care Platform backend. Import this file into Postman. After registering/logging in, the token is auto-saved to the {{token}} variable.

item.name: 🔐 Auth
item.description: Mobile auth: Supabase phone OTP in the app, then `POST /api/auth/session` with `accessToken` to get a Pawffy JWT. Vendor signup: `POST /api/auth/vendor/register`.

item.name: 👤 Users

request.description: Primary address syncs to user profile (address, city, state).
Sets default address and syncs user profile fields.
Permanently deletes account. Requires body `{ "confirm": "DELETE" }`. Also removes Supabase auth user when configured.

item.description: Profile, saved addresses, and account deletion. Primary address syncs to user profile fields.

body.raw:
{
  "petId": "{{petId}}",
  "vetId": "{{vetId}}",
  "bookingType": "veterinarian",
  "bookingDate": "2026-07-15",
  "bookingTime": "10:00",
  "symptoms": "Lethargy and loss of appetite for 2 days",
  "notes": "First visit"
}

item.name: 💰 Wallet
item.description: Wallet balance and transactions. Requires `WALLET_PAYMENTS_ENABLED=true` on the server for top-up, withdraw, and booking wallet payments.

request.description: Adds balance instantly (dev/direct credit). Requires WALLET_PAYMENTS_ENABLED=true.
Deducts balance (Send to Bank flow). Requires sufficient balance.

body.raw:
{
  "petId": "{{petId}}",
  "diagnosis": "Mild ear infection",
  "prescription": "Ear drops twice daily for 7 days",
  "allergies": "None known",
  "symptoms": "Scratching ears, head shaking",
  "reportUrl": "https://example.com/report/001.pdf"
}

query.description: Set to true to only fetch unread

item.name: Get All Image Analyses for Pet
